summary: Adjusted the opening so Chapter 12 enters through Fasa's physical vantage at the flood rather than another time-led scaffold, while preserving the same counting and continuity information. The existing ending already handed off cleanly into the next morning's breakfast scene, so no exit prose change was needed.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around Fasa standing at the hall edge and looking down at the floodwater.
Moved the fifteen-day counting line beneath the new spatial opening to diversify the chapter entry from the adjacent dawn-based opening.
Reworded the following flood description to remove redundant movement after the new opening setup.
